summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Bhaiya AI final visual overhaul. All landing page features working perfectly including split hero with phone mockup, social proof bar, bento feature grid, and modes section. Dashboard, chat, and FaceTime pages all functional. All backend endpoints 100% operational.

All navigation buttons working (Get Started, See it in action, Try All Modes)
